prompt: Create a blog article page in one HTML file. Title: Getting Started with Web Development. Author name, date, 5 min reading time. 3 sections with h2 headings, paragraphs, a code snippet block, and a bulleted list. Sidebar: table of contents, author bio card. Tags at bottom. Share buttons. 2 preloaded comments. Clean serif text, max-width 700px. Responsive.

Author info

prompt: Create a long-form blog article with interactive elements in one HTML file. Title: 'The Future of Remote Work'. Hero with reading progress bar at top (tracks scroll position). Table of contents sidebar (sticky, highlights current section on scroll). 5 sections with h2 headings. Pull quotes (styled blockquotes). An embedded poll: 'Do you prefer remote or office?' with 3 options, click to vote, show results bar chart. Image gallery (4 placeholders in a 2x2 grid with captions). Newsletter signup inline. Estimated reading time updates as you scroll. Dark mode toggle. Social share floating sidebar. Related articles (3 cards). Comments with reply threading (2 comments, 1 reply).

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=="none"&&s.visibility!=="hidden"&&parseFloat(s.opacity||"1")>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const blocks=[...document.getElementsByTagName("pre"),...document.getElementsByTagName("code")].filter(visible);if(blocks.length<3)return false;const tokens=[];const walker=document.createTreeWalker(document.body,NodeFilter.SHOW_ELEMENT);while(walker.nextNode()){const el=walker.currentNode;if(!el.closest("pre")&&!el.closest("code"))continue;const cls=String(el.getAttribute("class")||"").toLowerCase();if(cls.includes("keyword")||cls.includes("string")||cls.includes("comment"))tokens.push(el);}const visibleTokens=tokens.filter(visible);if(visibleTokens.length<6)return false;const classText=visibleTokens.map(el=>String(el.getAttribute("class")||"").toLowerCase()).join(" ");const classes=["keyword","string","comment"].filter(x=>classText.includes(x)).length;const colors=new Set(visibleTokens.map(el=>getComputedStyle(el).color).filter(Boolean));return classes>=3&&colors.size>=3;})()

prompt: Create a data journalism article with interactive visualizations in one HTML file. Title: 'Climate Change: A Visual Story'. Scrollytelling format: text sections alternate with full-width data visualizations that animate as you scroll into view. Viz 1: SVG line chart of global temperature anomaly (20 data points, animates drawing). Viz 2: SVG bar chart of CO2 emissions by country (top 10). Viz 3: Interactive timeline slider (1950-2024) that updates a key statistic display. Viz 4: Before/after comparison slider (two colored rectangles representing ice coverage). Annotations: click highlighted terms to show tooltip definitions. Sources section with numbered footnotes. Scroll progress indicator. Responsive images. Print-friendly (hides interactive elements). Dark editorial theme with orange data accent.

prompt: Create an in-depth product review article as a single HTML file. Title: iPhone 16 Pro In-Depth Review. Structured review: 7 sections covering Unboxing/Design/Display/Performance/Camera/Battery Life/Summary. Each section: Subheading + Text + Rating bar (0-10 points, SVG or CSS) + Pros and cons list (green check/red cross). Camera section: Comparison gallery (6 sets of sample placeholders, slider toggle between Device A/B). Performance section: Benchmark comparison bar chart (SVG, 3 device models). Battery section: Usage time donut chart. Overall rating: Radar chart (6 dimensions). Buying recommendations: Recommendation cards for 3 user types. Price trend: Line chart (forecasting next 3 months). Comment section: Users can rate (5-star) + leave comments, displaying 5 existing comments. Table of contents navigation (sticky). Progress bar. Dark tech review aesthetic.

prompt: Build a comprehensive SDK documentation page in one HTML file. Three-column layout: left sidebar (section tree nav), center (content), right sidebar (on-page anchors). Sections: Getting Started (install command, quick example), Configuration (options table), Core Methods (6 methods with signature, params, return type, example), Events (4 events with description), Troubleshooting (5 common issues). Code blocks with language tabs (JavaScript/TypeScript/Python). Copy button on each code block. Search bar that filters sidebar items. Version selector dropdown. Breadcrumb navigation. 'Edit on GitHub' link. Dark code theme, light content.

Interactive API explorer: each endpoint has a 'Try It' button that opens a form (fill parameters, click Send, shows simulated JSON response below). 8 endpoints grouped by resource (Users: CRUD, Posts: CRUD). prompt: Create a tutorial documentation page as a single HTML file. Topic: Vue.js Getting Started Tutorial. Left sidebar with chapter navigation (8 chapters). Each chapter includes: title + description + code examples (with syntax highlighting CSS) + output display area (simulated results). Progress tracking: Each chapter has a completion checkbox, with overall progress displayed at the top (3/8). Code blocks: Line numbers display + copy button + fullscreen view button. Practice exercises: 1-2 multiple choice questions at the end of each chapter, showing correct/incorrect feedback upon selection. Search: Full-text search functionality. Bookmark feature: Click bookmark icon beside paragraphs to save, with bookmark list displayed on the right side. Data persistence using localStorage.

prompt: Build a complete developer documentation site in one HTML file. Features: (1) Multi-level sidebar nav (collapsible sections: Guides > 3 items, API Reference > 4 items, CLI > 2 items, Plugins > 3 items), (2) Version selector (v1.0/v2.0 changes displayed content), (3) Full-text search with highlighted results, (4) Code blocks with 4 language tabs + copy + line numbers, (5) Interactive API playground (endpoint selector dropdown, params form, mock response), (6) Mermaid-style diagram (CSS flowchart: boxes connected by lines), (7) Callout blocks (Note/Warning/Tip/Danger with icons and colors), (8) Changelog page (versioned entries with badges), (9) Edit this page link, (10) Light/dark theme toggle, (11) Keyboard shortcuts (/ for search, n/p for next/prev page), (12) Table of contents auto-generated from headings. Responsive. Print-friendly. ReadTheDocs-style theme.

prompt: Create an open-source project documentation website as a single HTML file. Project: FastDB (fictional database). Structure: Homepage (project introduction + quick start + feature list) + Installation Guide + Configuration Reference + Query Syntax + Performance Tuning + Migration Guide + FAQ + Changelog. Left tree navigation (collapsible). Homepage: Hero section (project name + tagline + GitHub stars mock + one-click copy install command). Quick Start: 3 steps (Install → Configure → Run) with numbered cards. Configuration Reference: Complete parameter table (30+ parameters, grouped collapsible, with search filter). Query Syntax: Interactive SQL editor (textarea, click run to display mock result table). Performance: Benchmark comparison chart (SVG bar chart, 3-database comparison). Full-text search (Ctrl+K shortcut to open search panel). Breadcrumb navigation. Version switcher (v1/v2). Community links (GitHub/Discord/Forum). Chinese/English toggle button. Dark developer documentation theme.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const faqs=[...document.querySelectorAll('details,summary,button,[role=button],article')].filter(visible).length;return faqs>=4;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["frequently asked questions", "frequently asked", "frequently", "technical", "general", "billing"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "details, button, summary", "gte": 8}, {"selector": "details, dt", "gte": 8}, {"selector": "details", "gte": 8}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=2)&&(true);})()

prompt: Create an interactive knowledge base FAQ in one HTML file. Left sidebar: category tree (5 categories, each with 3-5 subcategories). Main area: selected category shows its FAQs. 25 total questions. Breadcrumb shows current path. Each answer supports: text, code blocks, and embedded tips (colored callout boxes). Voting: thumbs up/down per answer with count. Related questions links at bottom of each answer. Recently viewed (tracks last 5 viewed, shown in sidebar). Global search with results highlighting. Popular questions section. Dark sidebar, white content.

prompt: Create an intelligent FAQ help page as a single HTML file. Features a large search box at the top (displays an autocomplete suggestion list when typing, matching against FAQ titles). Hot Questions: 6 quick tag buttons that jump directly to the respective question when clicked. Categories: 4 sections (User Guide/Account Security/Order Logistics/After-sales Service), with 6 questions per category. Accordion-style expansion for answers, supporting both text and images (image placeholders). Feedback: 5-star rating system below each answer. Bottom section: "Didn't find your answer?" contact customer service form (problem description + contact information). Statistics: Display view counts for each category (simulated data). Light blue customer service theme.

steps.expression: (()=>{function visible(el){if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;}const input=document.querySelector('input[type=search], input[placeholder], input[type=text]');if(!input) return false;const rect=input.getBoundingClientRect();const nearby=[...document.querySelectorAll('ul,ol,div')].filter(el=>{if(!visible(el)) return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();const txt=(el.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();if(!txt||txt.length>240) return false;return Math.abs(r.left-rect.left)<80&&r.top>=rect.bottom-5&&r.top<rect.bottom+220;}).map(el=>(el.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim());const titleMatches=nearby.filter(t=>/track my order|shipping address after ordering/i.test(t));return titleMatches.length>=2;})()

prompt: Build a multi-format help center in one HTML file. Three content types: FAQs (accordion, 15 questions), Video tutorials (6 cards with play icon and title, click opens modal with video placeholder + transcript text), Step-by-step guides (3 guides, each with numbered steps and screenshots placeholder). Tab navigation between types. Each FAQ has related video/guide cross-links. Feedback system: per-item helpful rating + overall NPS score prompt at bottom. Printable FAQ list. Category sidebar. Recently updated badge on new content. Community link. Status page link. Professional support CTA.

prompt: Create an AI-style smart FAQ system in one HTML file. Chat-like interface: user types a question, system matches against 30 pre-loaded FAQ entries using keyword matching and shows the best answer in a chat bubble. If no match, shows 'Sorry, I couldn't find an answer. Here are some suggestions:' with 3 closest matches. Fallback: 'Contact Support' button. Traditional FAQ view toggle: switch between chat mode and accordion list mode. FAQ management: admin toggle reveals add/edit/delete FAQ interface. Analytics dashboard: most asked questions (top 5 bar chart), unanswered query log, satisfaction pie chart. Auto-categorization of questions. Dark AI assistant theme.

test_cases.name: FAQ analytics dashboard structure

steps.expression: (()=>{const t=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase(); const analytics=/(analytics|dashboard|most asked|top 5|unanswered|satisfaction|chart)/.test(t); const faq=/(faq|question|answer|support|chat)/.test(t); const chart=document.querySelectorAll('svg,canvas,rect,path,circle,[class*=bar]').length>=2; return faq&&analytics&&chart;})()

Pricing page FAQ, Contact Sales, or comparison actions change visible state

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};window.__r16_before_text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const els=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],a,[role=tab],label,summary,li,th,td,div')].filter(visible);const re=/faq|contact sales|buy now|monthly|annual|yearly|compare|enterprise|quote/i;const target=els.find(el=>re.test((el.innerText||el.textContent||'').trim()))||els[0];if(target){target.click(); return true;}return false;})()
(()=>{const after=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();return after!==window.__r16_before_text;})()

test_cases.name: Pricing toggles or configurators change the visible quote numbers

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};window.__r16_before_numbers=(document.body.innerText.match(/[$¥€£]?\d[\d,.%x:-]*/g)||[]).join('|');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('input[type=range],input[type=checkbox],input[type=radio],input[type=number],select,button,[role=button]')].filter(visible);for(const el of controls.slice(0,4)){const tag=(el.tagName||'').toLowerCase();const type=((el.getAttribute('type')||'')+'').toLowerCase();if(tag==='select'&&el.options&&el.options.length>1){el.selectedIndex=Math.min(1,el.options.length-1); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}else if(type==='range'||type==='number'){el.value='75'; el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}else if(type==='checkbox'||type==='radio'){el.click();}else if(tag==='button'||type==='button'||type==='submit'){el.click();}}return true;})()
(()=>{const after=(document.body.innerText.match(/[$¥€£]?\d[\d,.%x:-]*/g)||[]).join('|');return after.length>0&&after!==window.__r16_before_numbers;})()

prompt: Create a membership tier comparison page in a single HTML file. Three tiers: Free / Standard (¥29/month) / Pro (¥79/month). Each card includes: tier name, price, 8 features (check ✓ or cross ✗), and a subscribe button. Standard tier has a "Recommended" badge. Monthly/yearly billing toggle (20% discount on yearly). Bottom section: full feature comparison table (10 features × 3 tiers). Clean blue and white design style.

test_cases.name: Prompt-specific text anchors appear together on the page

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const prices=((document.body.innerText||'').match(/[$¥€£]?\d[\d,.]*(?:\/\w+)?/g)||[]).length;const tiers=[...document.querySelectorAll('table tr,article,section,[class*=card],li')].filter(visible).length;return prices>=3&&tiers>=3;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["20%", "\u00a529", "\u00a579", "recommended", "standard", "free"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "li", "gte": 10}, {"selector": "tr", "gte": 8}, {"selector": "button", "gte": 5}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=2)&&(true);})()

steps.expression: (async()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=s=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const pageText=()=>norm(document.body.innerText||'');const hasMonthlyAnchors=()=>{const t=pageText();return /free/i.test(t)&&/standard/i.test(t)&&/pro/i.test(t)&&/[¥￥]\s*29\b/.test(t)&&/[¥￥]\s*79\b/.test(t)&&/recommended/i.test(t);};const hasYearlyDiscount=()=>{const t=pageText();const standardDiscount=/[¥￥]\s*(23(?:\.2)?|278(?:\.4)?)\b/.test(t);const proDiscount=/[¥￥]\s*(63(?:\.2)?|758(?:\.4)?)\b/.test(t);const yearly=/year|annual|billed yearly|annually|年付|年/.test(t);return standardDiscount&&proDiscount&&yearly;};if(!hasMonthlyAnchors())return false;if(hasYearlyDiscount())return true;const nodes=[...document.querySelectorAll('#billing-toggle,#billingToggle,button,[role=button],input,label,[onclick],.toggle-switch,.billing-toggle,.toggle-label')];const seen=new Set();const candidates=[];for(const el of nodes){if(seen.has(el))continue;seen.add(el);const meta=norm([el.innerText,el.textContent,el.value,el.id,el.className,el.name,el.getAttribute('aria-label'),el.getAttribute('for')].join(' '));if(/year|annual|billing|toggle|save\s*20|年付|月付/.test(meta.toLowerCase())&&(visible(el)||el.tagName==='INPUT'))candidates.push(el);}for(const el of candidates.slice(0,20)){try{el.click();await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,180));if(hasYearlyDiscount())return true;}catch(e){}}return false;})()

prompt: Build a SaaS pricing page with interactive calculator in one HTML file. 4 tiers: Starter (free), Growth ($29), Business ($79), Enterprise (custom). Feature comparison matrix: 15 features in rows, 4 plans in columns, check/cross/partial icons. Tooltips on hover explaining each feature. Annual/monthly toggle with savings badge. Usage calculator: sliders for users (1-100), storage (1-100GB), API calls (1K-100K) — dynamically recommends the best plan and shows estimated cost. Testimonial under the recommended plan. FAQ section (5 questions). Money-back guarantee badge. Enterprise 'Contact Sales' form modal.

prompt: Create a cloud server pricing page as a single HTML file. Product: Cloud Server. Three preset configurations: Entry-level (2 vCPU 4GB ¥68/month), Standard (4 vCPU 8GB ¥168/month), High-performance (8 vCPU 16GB ¥368/month). Each pricing card must include: configuration details (CPU/Memory/Bandwidth/Storage), applicable scenario description, and a Buy Now button. Custom configuration section: four dropdown selectors (CPU cores/Memory/Bandwidth/Storage capacity) with real-time total price calculation. Discount tiers: 15% off for 1-year / 30% off for 2-year / 50% off for 3-year commitments, with subscription duration dynamically linked to price updates. Renewal reminder toggle switch. Service Level Agreement comparison table. Dark blue tech aesthetic.

prompt: Build an enterprise pricing configurator in one HTML file. Multi-step: Step 1: Select product (3 products as cards). Step 2: Choose tier (3 tiers with feature matrix). Step 3: Configure add-ons (5 optional modules as toggle cards with individual pricing). Step 4: Set quantity (team size slider 1-500, volume discounts at 10/50/100). Step 5: Review & Summary (itemized breakdown, subtotal, discount, tax estimate, total). Progress bar across top. Back/Next navigation. Pricing updates in real-time at each step. Comparison mode: side-by-side view of 2 configurations. Save quote as PDF button (print dialog). Currency selector (USD/EUR/GBP). Dark professional theme.

prompt: Create an educational course pricing page in a single HTML file. Course package: 5 courses (Python Basics/Web Development/Data Analysis/AI Introduction/Project Practice), each available for individual purchase (¥199-¥499) or via bundle selection. Bundles: 3 types (Any 2 courses 20% off/Any 3 courses 30% off/All 5 courses 50% off). Interaction: Checking courses automatically calculates the discounted price and savings amount. Each course card includes: Cover placeholder + Lesson count + Difficulty level + Instructor + Rating. Learning path recommendation: Display recommended learning order (flowchart) based on the selected course combination. Coupon: Input field + Verify button (enter SAVE10 to show an additional 10% discount). Installment payment options (3/6/12 months, displaying amount per installment). Payment methods: WeChat/Alipay/Bank card icons. 12,800 people have already purchased (number animation). 30-day refund guarantee. Limited time: Countdown timer (XX hours XX minutes XX seconds remaining until the offer ends).

steps.expression: (()=>{const t=((document.body.innerText||'')+' '+(document.documentElement.outerHTML||'')).toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ');const courses=['python basics','web development','data analysis','ai introduction','project practice'].filter(x=>t.includes(x)).length;const discounts=['20%','30%','50%'].filter(x=>t.includes(x)).length;const essentials=/save10|coupon/.test(t)&&/30[- ]?day|refund/.test(t)&&/(countdown|limited time|hours?|minutes?|seconds?|\d{1,2}:\d{2}:\d{2})/.test(t);return courses>=5&&discounts>=3&&essentials;})()

prompt: Build a password reset page in one HTML file. Two states: (1) Request reset: email input + 'Send Reset Link' button + back to login link. (2) After submit: success message 'Check your email for reset instructions' with animated checkmark. Validation: email required and valid format. Loading spinner on button during simulated 2-second submit. Centered card, minimal design.

prompt: Create a multi-step registration wizard in one HTML file. 3 steps with progress indicator: Step 1: Personal info (name, email, phone). Step 2: Account setup (username, password with strength meter, confirm password). Step 3: Preferences (avatar color picker, notification toggles for email/SMS/push, theme light/dark, language dropdown). Each step has Next/Back buttons. Validation per step (can't advance with errors). Final review step shows all entered data. Submit shows success animation. All data shown in browser, no actual submission. Responsive. Modern gradient buttons.

prompt: Create a unified login page in a single HTML file. Tab switching: Password Login / SMS Login / QR Code Login. Password Login: Phone/Email + Password + Graphic verification code (simple math problem like 3+5=?) + Remember me + Login button. SMS Login: Phone number + Verification code (Send button with 60-second countdown) + Login. QR Code Login: QR code placeholder (gray square) + Status prompt (Waiting for scan...) + Refresh button. Footer: Third-party login (WeChat/QQ/Weibo icon buttons). Register link + Forgot password link. Phone number validation (11 digits). Dark frosted glass effect background.

prompt: Build a complete authentication system UI in one HTML file. Pages (tab/route simulation): Login, Register, Forgot Password, Reset Password, Two-Factor Auth, Profile Setup. Login: email/password + social login buttons (Google, GitHub, Apple icons) + magic link option (enter email, shows 'link sent'). Register: multi-step (email → verify code → password → profile). 2FA page: 6-digit code input (auto-advance between digits, paste support). Profile setup: avatar upload placeholder, display name, bio textarea, timezone dropdown, notifications preferences. Session simulation: successful login shows dashboard with user greeting and logout button. Password rules: real-time validation checklist (8+ chars ✓, uppercase ✓, number ✓, special ✓). Brute force protection: lock account UI after 5 failed attempts with cooldown timer. CAPTCHA simulation. Remember device toggle. Responsive. Dark glassmorphism theme.

Features: 3 cards (Noise Cancellation, 40h Battery, Waterproof) with emoji icons. Specs table: weight, driver size, Bluetooth version, battery. Customer reviews: 3 star-rated reviews. Footer with links. White and dark gray, modern minimal. Responsive.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>30&&r.height>30;};const txt=el=>((el.innerText||el.textContent||el.value||el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')+'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim().toLowerCase();const active=()=>[...document.querySelectorAll('[aria-selected="true"],[aria-pressed="true"],[aria-expanded="true"],[aria-current],.active,.is-active,.selected,[data-active="true"]')].filter(visible).length;const media=()=>[...document.querySelectorAll('img,video,iframe,[class*=screen],[class*=mockup],[class*=phone]')].filter(visible).slice(0,8).map(el=>[el.tagName,el.getAttribute('src')||'',el.getAttribute('alt')||'',el.className||'',getComputedStyle(el).transform||'',getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage||''].join('|')).join('||');window.__r22_before_active=active(); window.__r22_before_media=media(); window.__r22_before_hash=location.hash||'';const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],[role=tab],label,input[type=radio],select')].filter(visible);const score=el=>{const t=txt(el); let s=0; if(/next|prev|feature|screen|review|download|app store|google play|play|badge|carousel/.test(t)) s+=6; if(/color|theme|option/.test(t)) s+=5; if(el.matches('[role=tab],input[type=radio],select')) s+=4; return s;};controls.sort((a,b)=>score(b)-score(a)); const target=controls[0]; if(!target) return false;if(target.tagName==='SELECT'&&target.options&&target.options.length>1){target.selectedIndex=Math.min(1,target.options.length-1); target.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); return true;}if(target.tagName==='INPUT'&&target.type==='radio'){target.click(); target.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); return true;}target.click(); return true;})()

(()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>30&&r.height>30;};const active=[...document.querySelectorAll('[aria-selected="true"],[aria-pressed="true"],[aria-expanded="true"],[aria-current],.active,.is-active,.selected,[data-active="true"]')].filter(visible).length;const media=[...document.querySelectorAll('img,video,iframe,[class*=screen],[class*=mockup],[class*=phone]')].filter(visible).slice(0,8).map(el=>[el.tagName,el.getAttribute('src')||'',el.getAttribute('alt')||'',el.className||'',getComputedStyle(el).transform||'',getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage||''].join('|')).join('||');const overlay=[...document.querySelectorAll('[role=dialog],dialog,[class*=modal],[class*=drawer],[class*=popover]')].some(visible);return overlay || active!==window.__r22_before_active || media!==window.__r22_before_media || (location.hash||'')!==window.__r22_before_hash;})()

User reviews: 3 items + star ratings. Limited-time offer countdown (CSS animated number flip). Green health theme.

prompt: Build a premium headphone product page with immersive scroll experience in one HTML file. Hero: full-screen with product floating (CSS 3D perspective), animated gradient background, tagline animates in. Scroll-triggered sections: (1) Sound quality - animated waveform SVG, (2) Design - 360-degree view simulation (click and drag rotates product placeholder through 8 angle images as colored divs), (3) Comfort - materials showcase with hover reveal, (4) Battery - animated charging bar filling to 60h, (5) Comparison table vs 3 competitors, (6) Reviews carousel (5 reviews), (7) Pricing with color picker (3 colors change product image placeholder hue). Sticky 'Add to Cart' bar appears after scrolling past hero. Parallax depth. Video testimonial section (placeholder with play button). Dark premium theme with gold accents.

prompt: Create a new energy vehicle product launch page as a single HTML file with an immersive experience. Hero section: full-screen dark background with vehicle silhouette reveal animation (CSS clip-path reveal), model name, and test drive booking button. Key specifications: 4 large statistics (Range 680km / 0-100km/h acceleration 3.5s / Battery capacity 100kWh / Fast charging 30min to 80%) with scroll-triggered counting animation. Exterior 360°: 8 angle thumbnails simulating rotation view, click to switch. 3 color options with click-to-change functionality using CSS filters. Interior showcase: 4 interactive hotspots (click to display detail overlays: Seats / Center Console / Sunroof / Trunk). Comparison: vs competitors table (3 columns). Test drive booking form (Name / Phone / City / Preferred Time). Delivery timeline (4 stages: Reservation → Configuration → Production → Delivery) with progress bar. Footer: dealer map placeholder + customer service hotline. Full parallax scrolling throughout. Deep blue-black + electric blue color theme.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const actions=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a,[role=button],input[type=submit]')].filter(visible).length;const sections=[...document.querySelectorAll('section,article,[class*=card],table,footer')].filter(visible).length;return actions>=2&&sections>=4;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["2025.6.21-22", "music festival", "main stage", "electronic", "starlight", "transport"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "body", "gte": 5}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=2)&&(true);})()

Interactive venue map (SVG floor plan with clickable rooms). Early bird countdown. Networking schedule. Professional dark blue theme.

prompt: Create an online live event page as a single HTML file. Include a countdown timer (days, hours, minutes, seconds) with CSS flip card animation. Event title: AI Technology Sharing Conference. Speakers: 4 guests (avatar placeholder, name, company, and topic). Schedule: Timeline format (14:00 Opening → 14:30 Topic 1 → 15:30 Topic 2 → 16:30 Roundtable → 17:00 End). Registration form: Name, Email, Company, and Job Title fields. Real-time registration counter simulation (increment by 1 every 5 seconds). Viewing platforms: 3 entry points (Bilibili, YouTube, Official Website) with icons. Past events section: 3 video cards (thumbnail placeholder, title, view count). Social share buttons (WeChat, Weibo). Design style: Blue-purple gradient tech aesthetic.

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML

prompt: Create a hackathon event page in one HTML file. Hero: 'HackFest 2025' with animated code rain background (CSS). Event details: 48-hour hackathon, dates, location + virtual option. Tracks: 4 challenge tracks (AI, Web3, Climate, Health) as clickable cards that expand to show details and prizes. Prize pool: $50K total, broken down per track and grand prize. Timeline: 8 milestones (registration opens, team formation, kickoff, checkpoints, judging, awards). Judges: 5 judge cards. Sponsors. FAQ accordion (6 questions). Register button opens modal form. Mentor signup separate tab. Live participant counter. Dark hacker theme (black + green + purple).

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML

prompt: Build a multi-day wedding event website in one HTML file. Elegant script fonts + serif. Sections: (1) Hero: couple names + date + location + countdown, (2) Our Story: timeline of relationship milestones (6 dates with descriptions), (3) Ceremony & Reception: two venue cards with address, time, dress code, map placeholder, (4) RSVP form: guest name, attending (yes/no radio), meal choice (3 options), dietary notes, plus-one toggle, number of guests counter, submit with confirmation, (5) Registry: 3 store links, (6) Travel: hotel recommendations (3 cards with name, distance, rate), flight info, (7) Photo gallery: 12 couple photos (gradient placeholders) in masonry layout with lightbox, (8) Guestbook: visitors can leave a message (name + message, displayed in a scrollable list, localStorage), (9) FAQ: 5 questions. Music toggle (background audio placeholder). Password-protected (simple prompt on first visit). Save-the-date calendar download button. Blush pink + gold + cream palette.

prompt: Create an online education platform SaaS landing page, single HTML file. Hero: Headline (Make Learning More Efficient) + subheadline + free trial button + product screenshot placeholder. Stats: 100k+ students / 5000+ courses / 98% positive rating (number animation). Features: 6-feature grid (Video Courses / Live Interaction / Homework Grading / Learning Analytics / Certificate Issuance / Community Discussion). Pricing: 3 tiers (Individual ¥29/month, Team ¥99/month, Enterprise Contact Us) with feature comparison list. Testimonials: 4 client logos + quote testimonials. Partners: 8 educational institution logos. Registration form: Name + Email + Institution type dropdown. Blue education theme.

Live demo section: interactive mini-dashboard preview (3 mini charts that update every 2 seconds with random data). Security badges: SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA icons. Integration: 12 tool logos in auto-scrolling marquee. Pricing: usage-based calculator (slider for data volume, price updates). 5 G2/Capterra review badges. Dark data-science theme.

prompt: Build an AI writing assistant SaaS landing page in one HTML file. Hero: split screen - left: headline + description + CTA, right: live demo textarea where typing shows AI suggestions appearing below (simulated: after 2 second pause, show 3 auto-generated suggestion cards). Product tour: 5-step interactive walkthrough (click Next to advance, each step highlights a different feature area with tooltip overlay). Features matrix: 4 plans x 15 features comparison grid with sticky header. Usage-based pricing calculator with 3 sliders (words/mo, users, API calls). ROI section: before/after productivity metrics animated. Integration ecosystem: categorized grid (Writing, Marketing, Dev, Design - 16 tools). Case studies: 3 expandable cards with metrics. API documentation preview: code snippet with syntax highlighting (simulated). Status page link showing 99.9% uptime badge. Live chat widget simulation (floating button, click opens chat window). Dark + electric blue theme.

prompt: Create an enterprise collaboration platform SaaS landing page as a single HTML file. Hero section: 3D floating card animation (CSS perspective) + headline (team collaboration, double the efficiency) + free trial button. Trust wall: scrolling marquee displaying 20 enterprise logos. Product matrix: 4 modules (Project Management/Document Collaboration/Instant Messaging/Knowledge Base), hover to expand details with screenshot placeholders. Comparison section: dynamic before/after slider (before: scattered icons, after: organized flowchart, slider control toggle). Customer stories: 3 case studies (click to expand full story with data metrics). Security certifications: ISO27001/Level 3 Protection/GDPR badges. Pricing: 4 tiers (Free/Standard ¥15/user/month/Professional ¥39/user/month/Enterprise Custom), annual billing toggle with 20% discount. ROI calculator: input team size and average salary to display annual time and cost savings. Live demo booking: calendar picker with time slot selection. Global search: page content search with keyword highlighting. Deep blue + white + orange corporate color scheme.

prompt: Create a developer tools platform SaaS page in one HTML file. Hero: terminal-style animation showing CLI commands being typed, headline 'Ship Code Faster', 'Start Building' CTA. Code playground: embedded code editor simulation (textarea with syntax highlighting CSS, run button that shows 'Output: Hello World' below). API reference preview: 3 endpoint cards (GET/POST/DELETE) with expandable code examples. SDK downloads: 6 language tabs (Python, JS, Go, Ruby, Java, PHP) each showing install command. Performance metrics: animated gauges (latency 12ms, uptime 99.99%, requests/sec 50K). Changelog: 5 recent updates with version badges. Status dashboard: 5 services with green/yellow/red indicators. Community: GitHub stars counter, Discord member count, contributor avatars. Pricing: per-request model with volume calculator. Documentation search bar. Dark terminal theme with cyan accents.

Restaurant page uses serif-forward warm styling instead of cart-state logic

steps.expression: (()=>{const body=getComputedStyle(document.body); const bg=(body.backgroundColor||'').match(/\d+/g)||[]; const warm=bg.length>=3 && Number(bg[0])>=140 && Number(bg[1])>=100 && Number(bg[2])<=120; const serif=[...document.querySelectorAll('body, h1, h2, h3, header, section')].some(el=>/serif/i.test(getComputedStyle(el).fontFamily||'')); const redish=[...document.querySelectorAll('*')].some(el=>{const c=(getComputedStyle(el).color||'').match(/\d+/g)||[]; return c.length>=3 && Number(c[0])>90 && Number(c[1])<90 && Number(c[2])<90;}); return serif && (warm || redish);})()

prompt: Create a single HTML file for a Chinese restaurant menu page. Restaurant name: Chuan Wei Fang (Sichuan Kitchen). Implement category tabs for switching between Cold Dishes, Hot Dishes, Soups, Staple Foods, and Drinks. Include 4-6 dishes per category (featuring dish name, brief description, price, and spiciness indicator 🌶). Highlight recommended dishes with a star icon. Add a top banner background. Footer should display address, phone number, and business hours. Use a red and gold color palette with traditional Chinese styling.

test_cases.name: 辣度标识
Hover on menu item shows details

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const broken=/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]| undefined | nan /i.test(text);const media=[...document.querySelectorAll('canvas,svg,img,video')].some(visible);const surface=[...document.querySelectorAll('main,section,article,div,table,ul,ol,canvas,svg,img,video')].some(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width*r.height>=1200;});return !broken&&(media||text.length>=20||surface);})()

Menu: visual grid of 12 sushi items as cards with image placeholder, name (Japanese + English), piece count, price. Click card to flip and show ingredients list on back (CSS 3D flip). Filter: All, Nigiri, Maki, Sashimi, Special. Cart sidebar: click 'Add' on any item adds it, shows item count and running total, 'Place Order' button. Chef's recommendations section with 3 highlighted items. Dark wood texture background, Japanese aesthetic.

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML

prompt: Create a digital hot pot menu as a single HTML file. Top section: Restaurant name (Shu Xiang Hot Pot) + table number input. Broth selection: 3 options (Spicy/Tomato/Half-and-Half) as radio buttons, with image placeholders and prices. Menu categories: Meat (8 items)/Vegetables (6 items)/Tofu Products (4 items)/Staple Foods (4 items)/Drinks (5 items), each with name + price + portion label (Small/Large). Plus/minus buttons to adjust quantity. Fixed bottom bar: X items selected, Total ¥XX, Submit Order button. Dish search box. Spiciness recommendation (auto-suggests dish sorting based on selected broth). Red hot/spicy visual style.

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML

prompt: Build a fine dining restaurant website in one HTML file. Elegant full-page sections with scroll-snap. (1) Hero: restaurant name in gold script font, parallax dark background, 'Reserve a Table' CTA. (2) Philosophy: chef's quote, food philosophy text. (3) Menu: 5-course tasting menu (Amuse-bouche, Appetizer, Fish, Main, Dessert) presented as elegant cards with poetic descriptions, wine pairing suggestion per course, dietary icons (V/GF/DF). Seasonal menu toggle (Spring/Summer/Autumn/Winter changes dishes). (4) Wine list: 12 wines in 3 categories (Red/White/Sparkling) with origin, grape, year, price, tasting notes expandable. (5) Private dining: 3 room options with capacity and price. (6) Reservation: date picker, time slots, party size, special requests textarea. (7) Gallery: 8 food photos (gradient placeholders) in elegant grid. (8) Contact: map placeholder, phone, email. Gold + black + cream luxury palette.

test_cases.name: Five named tasting-menu courses are present

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=document.body.innerText||'';const names=[/amuse[-\s]?bouche|amuse/i,/appetizer|starter/i,/fish|poisson|seafood/i,/\bmain\b|main course|entree/i,/dessert|sweet/i];const hasNames=names.every(re=>re.test(text));const cards=[...document.querySelectorAll('article,li,[class*=card],[class*=course],tr')].filter(el=>/(amuse|appetizer|starter|fish|main|dessert|course)/i.test(el.innerText||''));return hasNames&&cards.length>=5;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const label=el=>((el.innerText||el.textContent||el.value||el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')+'').trim();const menuText=()=>{const candidates=[...document.querySelectorAll('section,main,[id],[class]')].filter(visible).filter(el=>/amuse|appetizer|fish|main|dessert|course/i.test(el.innerText||''));return ((candidates[0]||document.body).innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();};const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],[role=tab],a,label,input[type=radio],select')].filter(visible).filter(el=>/spring|summer|autumn|fall|winter/i.test(label(el)||((el.parentElement&&el.parentElement.innerText)||'')));window.__rest006_season_before=menuText();if(controls.length){const target=controls.find(el=>!/spring/i.test(label(el)))||controls[0];if(target.tagName==='SELECT'){const opts=[...target.options];const opt=opts.find(o=>/summer|autumn|fall|winter/i.test(o.textContent||o.value))||opts[1];if(opt){target.value=opt.value;target.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}}else{target.click();}}return true;})()

(()=>{const visible=el=>{const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const menuText=()=>{const candidates=[...document.querySelectorAll('section,main,[id],[class]')].filter(visible).filter(el=>/amuse|appetizer|fish|main|dessert|course/i.test(el.innerText||''));return ((candidates[0]||document.body).innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();};const text=document.body.innerText||'';const hasSeasons=(/spring/i.test(text)&&/summer/i.test(text)&&(/autumn|fall/i.test(text))&&/winter/i.test(text));const now=menuText();return hasSeasons&&!!window.__rest006_season_before&&now!==window.__rest006_season_before;})()

prompt: Create a bakery online ordering page in a single HTML file. Hero section: Shop name (Sweet Time) + carousel featuring 3 signature products. Product catalog: Categories (Cakes/Bread/Cookies/Beverages), 6 products per category (image placeholder, name, description, price, size selection dropdown such as 6-inch/8-inch). Each product includes an add-to-cart button and quantity +/- controls. Cart sidebar: Selected items list with unit price, quantity, subtotal, total, coupon input field, and checkout button. Delivery information: Shipping address form + delivery time selection (today/tomorrow/day after tomorrow + time slots). Order confirmation modal displaying a summary of all information. Member points display. Product search and price sorting. New (NEW) and Hot Selling (HOT) badges. Pink sweet aesthetic style. Data persistence using localStorage.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const actions=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a,[role=button],input[type=submit]')].filter(visible).length;const sections=[...document.querySelectorAll('section,article,[class*=card],table,footer')].filter(visible).length;return actions>=2&&sections>=4;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["check out", "checkout", "adidas", "newest", "price", "nike"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=2)&&(true);})()

prompt: Create a clothing boutique e-commerce page in one HTML file. Categories: Women, Men, Accessories. 12 products with size selector (XS-XL dropdown), color options (3 swatches), wishlist heart toggle, quick view modal. Product card hover shows second image placeholder (different gradient). Sticky filter bar. Cart with quantity adjust, subtotal, estimated shipping, promo code input, total. Checkout form: shipping address, payment method radio (Credit Card/PayPal), place order button. Order confirmation screen. Recently viewed section (last 4). Elegant minimal black and white.

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML

prompt: Build a full-featured electronics e-commerce store in one HTML file. Mega menu navigation (hover reveals dropdown with subcategories). Search with autocomplete (type shows suggestion dropdown from hardcoded list). Hero carousel (3 promo slides). Featured products section (4), deals section (4 with countdown timers), new arrivals (4). Product detail: click opens full-page view with image gallery (4 thumbnails + main image swap), specs table, reviews (5 with star rating + helpful vote buttons), Q&A section, related products. Cart: full page cart with quantity adjust, save for later, apply coupon, shipping calculator by zip code, order summary. Checkout: 3-step (Shipping → Payment → Review). Order tracking page simulation. Compare feature: select up to 3 products, side-by-side comparison table. Dark tech theme.

prompt: Create a fresh food e-commerce homepage in a single HTML file. Top section: City location selector + Search bar + Shopping cart. Category navigation: Fruits/Vegetables/Meat/Seafood/Dairy/Snacks (with icons). Flash sale: 3 products + countdown timer. New user zone: 4 special offer products. Bestsellers ranking: Tabs (Fruits chart/Vegetables chart/Meat chart), 5 products per chart (ranking + image + name + price + sales volume). Product card: Image placeholder + name + specs (500g/1kg) + price + quantity buttons + Add to cart. Bottom shopping cart bar: Fixed, displaying selected quantity + total amount + Checkout button. Delivery time selection (Immediate delivery/Scheduled time slots). Green fresh food theme. Data stored in localStorage.

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML

prompt: Create a marketplace platform page in one HTML file. Multi-vendor: products from different sellers. Header: search with category dropdown, location, cart, user menu. Product grid: 16 products with seller badge, rating, price, shipping info, 'Add to Cart'. Product quick view modal: gallery, seller info, ship from location, delivery estimate, size chart popup. Advanced filters: category tree, price range dual slider, rating minimum, free shipping toggle, seller rating. Sort: relevance, price, rating, newest, bestselling. Pagination: 8 per page, page numbers. Wishlist with count badge. Recently viewed (4). Product comparison (select up to 4). Flash deals banner with countdown. Seller storefront link. Review summary (bar chart of 5-1 star distribution). Report listing button. Share buttons (copy link). Breadcrumb navigation. Dark marketplace theme.

steps.expression: (async()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=s=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const cards=()=>[...document.querySelectorAll('article,[class*=property],[class*=listing],[class*=card]')].filter(visible).filter(e=>/bed|bath|sqft|View Details|Apartment|House|Condo|\$/i.test(norm(e.innerText||e.textContent||'')));const priceSelect=[...document.querySelectorAll('select')].filter(visible).some(e=>/Any Price|Under|\$|M\+|500k|300k/i.test(norm(e.innerText||e.textContent||'')));if(!priceSelect)return false;const beforeCount=cards().length;const input=[...document.querySelectorAll('input[type=search],input[placeholder],input[type=text]')].filter(visible)[0];if(!input||beforeCount<6)return false;input.value='zzzznotfound';input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));input.dispatchEvent(new Event('keyup',{bubbles:true}));input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,600));const searchOk=cards().length!==beforeCount||/no results|not found|0 properties|try adjusting/i.test(norm(document.body.innerText||''));return searchOk;})()

prompt: Build a real estate agency website in one HTML file. Hero: search bar with location input, property type dropdown, price range, 'Search' button. Featured listings: 4 premium cards with large image placeholder, price overlay, address, bed/bath/sqft, agent photo placeholder. Map section: SVG simplified city grid with 8 pin markers at different locations, click pin to show property card popup. Recent listings: 8 properties in scrollable row. Agent team: 4 agent cards. Contact form. Mortgage calculator: loan amount, interest rate, term → monthly payment. Newsletter signup. Professional blue and white.

test_cases.name: Agent team exposes four visible rich cards with names, roles, and contact affordances

steps.expression: (()=>{const norm=s=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>15&&r.height>8;};const sections=[...document.querySelectorAll('section,main,div')].filter(visible).map(el=>{const text=norm(el.innerText||el.textContent);const low=text.toLowerCase();if(!/agent|realtor|broker|professionals|team/.test(low))return null;const cards=[...el.querySelectorAll('article,li,[class*=card],[class*=agent],.grid>div,[class*=grid]>div')].filter(visible).map(c=>norm(c.innerText||c.textContent)).filter(t=>/(agent|broker|specialist|expert|director|commercial|buyer|luxury|senior)/i.test(t));const uniq=[...new Set(cards.map(t=>t.slice(0,160)))];const rich=uniq.filter(t=>/(contact|email|call|message|phone|profile)/i.test(t));return {cards:uniq,rich,score:uniq.length*6+rich.length*8+Math.min(text.length/150,8)};}).filter(Boolean).sort((a,b)=>b.score-a.score);const best=sections[0];return !!best&&best.cards.length>=4&&best.rich.length>=4;})()

test_cases.name: Real-estate search shows location, property type, price range, and a search button

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase(); const hasLocation=/location/.test(text)||document.querySelectorAll('input').length>=1; const hasType=/property type|type/.test(text)||document.querySelectorAll('select').length>=1; const hasPrice=/price range|price/.test(text); const hasSearch=/search/.test(text); return hasLocation&&hasType&&hasPrice&&hasSearch;})()

test_cases.name: Featured section renders exactly four premium property cards with prices and facts

steps.expression: (()=>{const norm=s=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>15&&r.height>8;};const priceRe=/[$¥€]\s*\d[\d,.]*(?:\s*[kKmM])?/g;const sections=[...document.querySelectorAll('section,main,div')].filter(visible).map(el=>{const text=norm(el.innerText||el.textContent);const low=text.toLowerCase();if(!/featured\s+(listings|properties)|premium selection|handpicked/.test(low))return null;const prices=[...new Set((text.match(priceRe)||[]).map(x=>x.replace(/\s+/g,'')))].filter(p=>!/2,000,000/.test(p));const facts=(low.match(/\b(beds?|bds?|bath(?:s)?|ba|sqft|ft)\b/g)||[]).length;return {prices,facts,score:20+prices.length*4+facts+Math.min(text.length/200,8)};}).filter(Boolean).sort((a,b)=>b.score-a.score);const best=sections[0];return !!best&&best.prices.length===4&&best.facts>=4;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const norm=s=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>15&&r.height>8;};const priceRe=/[$¥€]\s*\d[\d,.]*(?:\s*[kKmM])?/g;const sections=[...document.querySelectorAll('section,main,div')].filter(visible).map(el=>{const text=norm(el.innerText||el.textContent);const low=text.toLowerCase();if(!/\brecent\s+(listings|properties)\b|newest properties|fresh properties/.test(low))return null;const prices=[...new Set((text.match(priceRe)||[]).map(x=>x.replace(/\s+/g,'')))];const facts=(low.match(/\b(beds?|bds?|bath(?:s)?|ba|sqft|ft)\b/g)||[]).length;return {prices,facts,score:20+prices.length*4+facts+Math.min(text.length/200,8)};}).filter(Boolean).sort((a,b)=>b.score-a.score);const best=sections[0];return !!best&&best.prices.length>=8&&best.facts>=8;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>30&&r.height>30;};const txt=el=>((el.innerText||el.textContent||el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')+'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim().toLowerCase();const popup=()=>[...document.querySelectorAll('[role=dialog],dialog,[class*=popup],[class*=modal],[class*=tooltip],[class*=card]')].filter(visible).map(el=>txt(el)).join('||');window.__r22_before_popup=popup(); window.__r22_before_hash=location.hash||''; window.__r22_before_active=[...document.querySelectorAll('[aria-selected="true"],[aria-expanded="true"],[aria-current],.active,.is-active,.selected,[data-active="true"]')].filter(visible).length;const pin=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg circle,[class*=pin],[data-pin],button,[role=button],a')].filter(el=>{if(!visible(el)) return false; const t=txt(el); return el.matches('svg circle,[class*=pin],[data-pin]') || /view|detail|map|gallery|tour|search|property/.test(t);});const target=pin[0]; if(!target) return false; target.click(); return true;})()

(()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>30&&r.height>30;};const popup=[...document.querySelectorAll('[role=dialog],dialog,[class*=popup],[class*=modal],[class*=tooltip],[class*=card]')].filter(visible);const popupText=popup.map(el=>((el.innerText||el.textContent||'')+'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim().toLowerCase()).join('||');const active=[...document.querySelectorAll('[aria-selected="true"],[aria-expanded="true"],[aria-current],.active,.is-active,.selected,[data-active="true"]')].filter(visible).length;return popup.length>0 || popupText!==window.__r22_before_popup || active!==window.__r22_before_active || (location.hash||'')!==window.__r22_before_hash;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const norm=s=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>=8&&r.height>=8;};const candidates=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg circle,svg [class*=pin],svg [data-pin],svg g,[class*=map-pin],[class*=pin][style],[data-pin]')].filter(visible).filter(el=>{const box=el.getBoundingClientRect();const txt=norm(el.innerText||el.textContent||el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');return box.width>=8&&box.height>=8&&box.width<400&&box.height<400&&(el.closest('svg')||/pin|map/i.test(String(el.className)+' '+txt));});const uniq=[];for(const el of candidates){const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();const key=[Math.round(r.left/4),Math.round(r.top/4),Math.round(r.width/4),Math.round(r.height/4)].join(':');if(!uniq.includes(key))uniq.push(key);}return uniq.length>=8;})()

prompt: Create a new real estate property detail page as a single HTML file. Property name: Emerald Bay Garden. Hero section: Large image carousel (3 gradient placeholders) + property name + average price (28,000 yuan/㎡) + launch date. Unit types: 4 unit cards (floor plan placeholder + area + price range + orientation), click to view full-size image. Surrounding amenities: Simplified SVG map with markers (2 schools, 2 hospitals, 2 subway stations, 2 shopping malls, each with distance). Building layout: Simplified site plan, click building to show available floor information. Developer information card. Viewing appointment form (name + phone + appointment time). Property gallery tabs (Exterior/Interior/Showroom/Location). Gold and dark blue premium color scheme.

prompt: Create a property search platform in one HTML file. Advanced search: location autocomplete (hardcoded suggestions), property type multi-select, price range dual slider, bedrooms/bathrooms selectors, sqft range, year built, amenities checkboxes (pool, garage, garden, AC, furnished). Results: 10 properties in list or grid toggle view. Each: image carousel (3 thumbnails), price, address, specs, save/heart button, share button, virtual tour badge. Sort: price, sqft, newest. Map/list toggle: list view or map view (SVG city map with property pins, click shows popup). Property detail page: full gallery (6 images with lightbox), description, features list, agent card with contact form, neighborhood info (walk score, schools, transit), price history chart (SVG line), similar properties (4). Saved searches. Compare properties (side by side table). Responsive.

prompt: Create a second-hand property trading platform page as a single HTML file. Multi-dimensional filters: Area (dropdown tree: District → Street), Price (Under 500k/500k-1M/1M-2M/Above 2M), Layout (1BR/2BR/3BR/4BR+), Size (Under 50㎡/50-80㎡/80-120㎡/120+㎡), Features (Near Subway/School District/Only Property Owned for 5+ Years). Property list: 12 items, toggle between list view (image left, content right) and grid view. Each card includes: Image, Title, Total Price, Unit Price, Area, Layout, Floor, Orientation, Year Built, Agency Name. Favorite/Share buttons. Detail modal: 20 images (Tab categories: Interior/Floor Plan/Community), Basic info table, Mortgage calculator (Commercial/Provident Fund/Combined loan tabs, down payment ratio slider, loan term, monthly payment calculation), Transaction history (last 5 records), Surroundings (Schools/Hospitals/Subway list), Agent card + Online consultation button. Comparison: Select 2-3 properties to compare. Map search: SVG city map with price tag bubbles. Pagination (6 per page). Data stored in localStorage.

prompt: Create a developer portfolio page in one HTML file. Sections: (1) Hero with name 'Alex Chen', title 'Frontend Developer', and a brief tagline. (2) About section with a short bio paragraph. (3) Skills section with 6 technology badges (HTML, CSS, JS, React, Node.js, Git) as styled pills. (4) Projects section with 3 project cards (title, description, 'View Project' link). (5) Contact section with email link and GitHub link. Simple navigation bar at top linking to each section. Dark theme with blue accent. Smooth scroll.

test_cases.name: Semantic HTML

prompt: Create a full-featured developer portfolio with animated sections. Hero: particles.js-style background (implemented with canvas, not library), name with glitch text animation, typed.js-style rotating titles ('Full Stack Developer', 'Open Source Contributor', 'Cloud Architect' cycling). About: timeline of career history (4 entries with dates, companies, roles). Skills: radar/spider chart (SVG) showing 6 skill dimensions. Projects: horizontal scroll carousel of 6 projects with parallax card effect. Blog preview: 3 latest posts (title, date, excerpt). Testimonials: auto-rotating quotes (3). Contact form with validation. Analytics-style visitor counter. Performance: lazy-loaded sections, intersection observer animations. Dark mode default, toggle to light. Fully responsive.

Semantic HTML

prompt: Create a creative developer portfolio as a single HTML file with a magazine-style layout. Non-traditional scrolling: horizontal scrolling page using CSS scroll-snap, with one full chapter per viewport. Chapters: (1) Cover: Large display name + dynamic background (CSS gradient animation), (2) About: Two-column layout (photo placeholder + text), (3) Skills: Interactive skill tree (click to expand sub-skills), (4) Projects: Full-screen project showcase (background color transitions, large title + description + tech stack, left/right arrows to navigate 6 projects), (5) Open Source Contributions: GitHub-style contribution heatmap (CSS Grid), (6) Contact: Full-screen contact form + social links. Each chapter features a unique color theme. Bottom dot indicators display the current page. Support keyboard left/right arrow navigation. Switch to vertical scrolling on mobile devices.

Left dark sidebar skill rail shows six visible skill rows with percentage labels and bars

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=t=>(t||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim().toLowerCase();const dark=el=>{const rgb=(getComputedStyle(el).backgroundColor||'').match(/\d+/g);if(rgb&&rgb.length>=3)return rgb.slice(0,3).map(Number).reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)<360;const style=((getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage||'')+' '+(el.getAttribute('style')||'')+' '+(el.className||'')).toLowerCase();return /blue|navy|sidebar|#1e3|#2c3e50|#1e3c72|#1e3a8a/.test(style);};const sidebar=[...document.querySelectorAll('aside,[class*=sidebar],.sidebar,[class*=side]')].filter(visible).find(el=>dark(el)&&/技能|skill/.test(norm(el.innerText)));if(!sidebar)return false;const skillItems=[...sidebar.querySelectorAll('div,li,section,article')].filter(visible).filter(el=>{const labels=[...el.querySelectorAll('*')].filter(visible).map(n=>norm(n.innerText)).filter(t=>/^\d{1,3}%$/.test(t));const bars=[...el.querySelectorAll('progress,[role="progressbar"],div,span')].filter(visible).filter(n=>{const r=n.getBoundingClientRect();const cls=((n.className||'')+' '+(n.getAttribute('style')||'')).toLowerCase();return r.width>=40&&r.height>=4&&r.height<=20&&(r.width>=r.height*4)&&(/progress|skill|bar/.test(cls)||/width\s*:\s*\d{1,3}%/.test(n.getAttribute('style')||'')||/rounded-full|rounded/.test(cls));});return labels.length>=1&&bars.length>=1;});return skillItems.length>=6;})()

prompt: Build a modern resume page in one HTML file. Two-column layout: left sidebar (30% width, dark background) with photo placeholder, contact info, skills as horizontal bars, languages (English fluent, Spanish intermediate), interests icons. Main area (70%, white) with name/title header, professional summary, 4 work experiences, 2 education entries, 2 certifications. Clean sans-serif font. Icons using emoji for section headers. Responsive: single column on mobile.

prompt: Create an interactive resume with timeline visualization in one HTML file. Vertical timeline down the center, alternating left/right cards for each entry. Entries: 2 education + 4 work experiences, ordered chronologically. Each card: date badge, title, organization, description. Cards animate in on scroll (fade + slide). Sticky sidebar with contact info and quick nav links. Skills section: interactive radar chart (SVG, 6 axes). Download PDF button (simulated: shows print dialog). Dark/light theme toggle. Fully responsive.

prompt: Create a data-driven interactive resume in a single HTML file. Top section: Profile photo placeholder + Name (Zhang Siyuan) + one-line professional tagline. Data dashboard: Years of experience (8 years, circular progress ring), Project count (25+, animated number counter), Tech stack (12 types). Experience timeline: Clickable expand/collapse for each job entry details. Skills matrix: Categories (Frontend/Backend/DevOps/Database), 3-4 skills per category, star ratings (1-5 stars). Portfolio: 4 project thumbnails (gradient color blocks), hover to display details. Testimonials: Carousel with 2 colleague reviews. Footer: Contact information + social links. Smooth animations throughout. Fully responsive.

Languages as flag icons with proficiency bars. Hobbies as a tag cloud. Color palette: coral and navy. Scroll-triggered animations. Print button that switches to traditional A4 layout.

prompt: Build a multi-page resume application in one HTML file. Tab navigation: Resume, Cover Letter, References, Portfolio. Resume tab: full ATS-friendly resume with all standard sections. Cover Letter tab: editable template with placeholder fields (click to edit inline, contenteditable). References tab: 3 reference cards with name, title, relationship, contact. Portfolio tab: 6 project cards with filter by type. Features: export each tab as printable page, editable mode toggle (click any text to edit it inline), auto-save to localStorage, import/export all data as JSON, word count for cover letter, spell-check simulation (red underline random words). Responsive. Professional blue-gray theme.

prompt: Build an immersive 3D-style creative portfolio using CSS 3D transforms. Landing: 3D card flip to reveal intro (front: name in large text, back: tagline and photo placeholder). Gallery: CSS 3D rotating cube that shows a different project on each face (6 faces, use translateZ). Scroll-triggered: sections appear with 3D perspective tilt. Project detail: full-screen takeover with zoom-in transition. Navigation: floating 3D rotating menu icon. Skills displayed as orbiting 3D tags (CSS animation). Parallax depth layers throughout. Custom cursor. Sound toggle for ambient background (Web Audio API). Works on mobile (simplified 2D fallback).

test_cases.name: Creative portfolio uses prompt-required CSS 3D cube, orbiting skills, and sound toggle

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase(); const css=[...document.styleSheets].flatMap(s=>{try{return [...s.cssRules].map(r=>r.cssText)}catch(e){return []}}).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const has3d=/preserve-3d|translatez|rotatey|rotatex|perspective/.test(css); const cube=/cube|face|translatez/.test(text+css); const faces=(text.match(/project/g)||[]).length>=4 || document.querySelectorAll('[class*=face], [class*=project]').length>=4; const orbit=/orbit|tag|skill/.test(text+css); const sound=/sound|audio|ambient/.test(text); return has3d && cube && faces && orbit && sound;})()

prompt: Create an interactive photographer portfolio as a single HTML file with a gallery experience. Home page: fullscreen image carousel (5 gradient color blocks, auto-switching + manual swipe, bottom-right counter 1/5). Work categories: Landscape/Portrait/Street/Commercial (switchable). 6-8 photos per category, masonry layout, lazy loading simulation (fade-in on scroll). Lightbox: click to enlarge, support left/right arrow key navigation, display EXIF info (simulated: Aperture/Shutter Speed/ISO/Focal Length). Slideshow mode button (auto fullscreen playback). Map View tab: simulated map (simplified SVG world map) marking photo locations, click location to display photos from that place. About: photographer bio + gear list. Download original image button (simulated). Dark theme, photo border shadow effects.

prompt: Create a personal brand page for a tech blogger/KOL, single HTML file. Hero Section: Full-screen video background placeholder with dark gradient overlay, blogger name, one-line slogan, and subscribe button (click to open email input modal). Stats Matrix: Total followers (500k+, animated counter), articles (300+), videos (120+), awards (5), each featuring an icon and counting animation. Featured Content: 3 tabs (Articles/Videos/Courses), each displaying 4 content cards with thumbnail, title, date, and view count. Collaboration Cases: 8 brand logos in an infinite scrolling marquee. Tech Stack: Interactive tag cloud with hover scale and color change effects. Reader Reviews: 3 testimonials in an auto-rotating carousel. Personal Journey: Timeline with 5 milestones. Contact Area: Multi-platform links (WeChat/Zhihu/Bilibili/GitHub) plus business collaboration email. Scroll-triggered animations throughout. Dark tech aesthetic with neon blue accents. Fully responsive design.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const broken=/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]| undefined | nan /i.test(text);const media=[...document.querySelectorAll('canvas,svg,img,video')].some(visible);const surface=[...document.querySelectorAll('main,section,article,div,table,ul,ol,canvas,svg,img,video')].some(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width*r.height>=1200;});return !broken&&(media||text.length>=20||surface);})()

prompt: Create a research team showcase website, single HTML file. Header: Lab name + University logo placeholder + Navigation. Homepage: Carousel displaying 3 research highlights (large image + title + abstract). Members: Detailed PI introduction + photo placeholder, grouped by role (Postdocs/PhD/Master's/Undergraduate/Alumni), individual cards for each person (photo/name/research direction/personal homepage link). Alumni displayed in collapsible sections by year. Research: 5 research directions, each with schematic placeholder + description + related paper links. Publications: List 30 papers in reverse chronological order, filterable by type/year/keywords, each expandable to view abstract and BibTeX. News: 10 updates (date + title + brief), paginated (5 per page). Resources: Open source code list (GitHub links) + Dataset list + Tutorial list. Join Us: Recruitment information + Contact details. Gallery: Team building/Academic conferences/Awards photo wall (masonry layout, 12 placeholders). Search: Site-wide search box. Academic blue theme, rigorous yet modern.

test_cases.name: Rendered UI does not show undefined, NaN, or object placeholders

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(()=>{const walker=document.createTreeWalker(document.body,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT,{acceptNode(node){const p=node.parentElement;if(!p) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;if(p.closest('pre,code,script,style,textarea')) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT;}});let text='';while(walker.nextNode()){text+=' '+(walker.currentNode.nodeValue||'');}return text.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();})();return !(/\[object Object\]|\bundefined\b|\bNaN\b/.test(text));})()
